title: open-vm-tools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[13.0.0-1.0.1.el9_7.1]
- Fix spaces in vmware udev rule for scsi devices [Orabug: 24461968]
- Fix vmware udev rule in 99-vmware-scsi-timeout.rules file. [Orabug: 22815019]
- Increase timeout for scsi devices on VMWare guests by adding a udev rule. [Orabug: 21819156]

[13.0.0-1.el9_7.1]
- ovt-Address-CVE-2025-41244.patch [RHEL-117395]
- Resolves: RHEL-117395
  ([CISA Major Incident] CVE-2025-41244 open-vm-tools: Local privilege escalation in open-vm-tools [rhel-9.7])

[13.0.0-1]
- Rebase to 13.0.0 [RHEL-99158]
- Resolves: RHEL-99158
  ([ESXi][RHEL9] open-vm-tools version 13.0.0 has been released - please rebase)
full_text:
[13.0.0-1.0.1.el9_7.1]
- Fix spaces in vmware udev rule for scsi devices [Orabug: 24461968]
- Fix vmware udev rule in 99-vmware-scsi-timeout.rules file. [Orabug: 22815019]
- Increase timeout for scsi devices on VMWare guests by adding a udev rule. [Orabug: 21819156]

[13.0.0-1.el9_7.1]
- ovt-Address-CVE-2025-41244.patch [RHEL-117395]
- Resolves: RHEL-117395
  ([CISA Major Incident] CVE-2025-41244 open-vm-tools: Local privilege escalation in open-vm-tools [rhel-9.7])

[13.0.0-1]
- Rebase to 13.0.0 [RHEL-99158]
- Resolves: RHEL-99158
  ([ESXi][RHEL9] open-vm-tools version 13.0.0 has been released - please rebase)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20841.html
